EmailTemplate.description: Email to use after ringing a new Tradeshake lead and making no contact by phone, with calendar invite included.
EmailTemplate.name: Tradeshake Follow Up (Calendar)
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote via Tradeshake
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve not been able to reach you today regarding your request for an insurance quote via our partner, Tradeshake.
As a client of Tradeshake, you are entitled to a discount of 10% off our standard business insurance package.
It will only take 5-10 minutes to provide you with a comprehensive quote. Book a call with me today - https://calendly.com/d/cqx7-zw6-htm/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-tradeshake
Here at Kingsbridge we offer a complete package of cover that is designed specifically for UK businesses. Our comprehensive package includes Public Liability, Goods and Tools cover, and Employers’ Liability (if required).
Why buy with Kingsbridge?
- Nil excess* - guarantees no unexpected out-of-pocket expenses in the event of a claim. - Tools cover included at no extra cost - feel safe with 24-hour cover and new for old replacements for any thefts or accidents. Plus, a next business day payment after your claim is agreed. - Height work accepted - with specific limits subject to job role. - Hot Work accepted - across all trades including grinders, blow torches, hot air guns and more.
So, I can discuss with you which parts of the policy would be relevant for your business, it would be great to speak over the phone. Book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/cqx7-zw6-htm/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-tradeshake
Alternatively, you can reply to let me know a good time to call or contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
*Nil Excess applicable to Public Liability and Goods and Tools Cover only.
